title: JS Events
description: Lerne mit addEventListener auf Benutzerinteraktionen wie Klicks und Eingabeänderungen zu reagieren

lessons.title: Klick-Events
lessons.description: Use <kbd>addEventListener('click', ...)</kbd> to run code when a user clicks an element. The first argument is the event name, the second is a callback function.
lessons.task: Füge einen Click-Listener am <kbd>.btn</kbd>-Element hinzu, der den <kbd>.msg</kbd>-Text auf <kbd>"Clicked!"</kbd> setzt
lessons.previewBaseCSS: body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 1rem; } .btn { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; background: steelblue; color: white; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; }
lessons.codePrefix:
const btn = document.querySelector('.btn');
const msg = document.querySelector('.msg');

lessons.title: Klassen umschalten
lessons.description: Combine events with <kbd>classList.toggle()</kbd> to switch a class on and off. Each click adds the class if missing, or removes it if present.
lessons.task: Füge einen Click-Listener an <kbd>.btn</kbd> hinzu, der die Klasse <kbd>"on"</kbd> auf <kbd>.lamp</kbd> umschaltet
lessons.previewBaseCSS: body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 1rem; text-align: center; } .btn { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; background: steelblue; color: white; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; } .lamp { font-size: 3rem; margin-top: 1rem; opacity: 0.3; transition: opacity 0.3s; } .lamp.on { opacity: 1; }
lessons.codePrefix:
const btn = document.querySelector('.btn');
const lamp = document.querySelector('.lamp');

lessons.title: Input-Events
lessons.description: The <kbd>input</kbd> event fires every time the value of an input field changes. Use <kbd>event.target.value</kbd> to read the current value.
lessons.task: Füge einen Input-Listener an <kbd>.field</kbd> hinzu, der den <kbd>.out</kbd>-Text auf den Eingabewert setzt
lessons.previewBaseCSS: body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 1rem; } .field { padding: 0.5rem; border: 2px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 1rem; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; }
lessons.codePrefix:
const field = document.querySelector('.field');
const out = document.querySelector('.out');
